dimensions.name: source_understanding
dimensions.label: Source understanding
dimensions.description: Ability to interpret source structure and meaning before selecting or reshaping content.

dimensions.name: clip_selection
dimensions.label: Clip selection
dimensions.description: Ability to identify high-value short-form moments.

dimensions.name: narrative_restructuring
dimensions.label: Narrative restructuring
dimensions.description: Ability to compress story-heavy material into a coherent short-form structure.

dimensions.name: transcript_subtitle_workflow
dimensions.label: Transcript and subtitle workflow
dimensions.description: Usefulness of transcript and subtitle layers for editing and packaging.

dimensions.name: voiceover_tts_compatibility
dimensions.label: Voiceover / TTS compatibility
dimensions.description: Suitability for recap and narration-led workflows.

dimensions.name: batch_output
dimensions.label: Batch output
dimensions.description: Efficiency in turning one source into multiple publishable outputs.

dimensions.name: manual_control
dimensions.label: Manual control
dimensions.description: Ease of intervention, adjustment, and polishing.

dimensions.name: distribution_readiness
dimensions.label: Distribution readiness
dimensions.description: How close the result is to publishable short-form content.
